description: Workflow for fetching weekly cat fact, updating entity, sending emails, and updating metrics
name: WeeklyCatFactSubscriptionWorkflow

transitions.description: Fetch cat fact from external API
transitions.end_state_description: Cat fact has been fetched from external API
transitions.name: fetch_cat_fact

externalized_processors.description: Fetch cat fact from external API
externalized_processors.name: processFetchCatFact

transitions.description: Update entity with fetched cat fact
transitions.end_state_description: Entity updated with cat fact and timestamp
transitions.name: update_entity_with_fact

externalized_processors.description: Update entity attributes with cat fact
externalized_processors.name: processUpdateEntityWithFact

transitions.start_state_description: Cat fact has been fetched from external API

transitions.description: Send cat fact emails to all subscribers
transitions.end_state_description: Cat fact emails sent to subscribers
transitions.name: send_emails_to_subscribers
transitions.start_state_description: Entity updated with cat fact and timestamp

transitions.description: Update interaction metrics after email send
transitions.name: update_interaction_metrics
transitions.start_state_description: Cat fact emails sent to subscribers
